overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit metropolis. The player emerges from a dark enclosed alley into covered sidewalks beneath elevated highways, then transitions to open streets lined with holographic billboards, corporate skyscrapers, and cyberpunk storefronts before crossing a major intersection.

events.description: emerges from pitch-black enclosed space into dimly lit covered street with neon lights visible ahead
exits narrow alley into covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking forward through dark corridor toward the lit street ahead

entered.detail: rough concrete walls of the narrow passage
elevated highway structure visible at the end of the alley
bright orange concrete barriers lining the sidewalk edge
glowing cyan and purple commercial signs

segments.scene_description: The clip begins in a dark, enclosed alleyway with debris scattered on the concrete floor. The camera moves forward, emerging from the darkness into a covered urban street beneath an elevated highway, where neon signs and orange safety barriers become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: black vehicle passes by on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, passing digital advertisements and street furniture

notable_agents.action: person walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen showing a face
futuristic automated vendor with glowing interface
massive structural columns holding up the highway above

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing orange safety barriers and digital billboards. The area is dimly lit with mixed neon and artificial lighting, with occasional pedestrians and vehicles passing by on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with neon storefronts and bars

events.description: exits covered highway underpass into open plaza area with visible sky
intense pink and purple neon lighting becomes dominant from storefront on left

agents.ego_description: walking past concrete pillars into an open area, passing a neon-lit bar with outdoor seating

notable_agents.action: person sitting at the outdoor neon bar counter

entered.detail: building facade bathed in magenta neon light with japanese lanterns
traditional paper-style lanterns with japanese characters glowing white
corporate signage for DELAMAIN with art deco styling
small illuminated vendor booth on the sidewalk
tall palm trees lining the street against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the highway into an open plaza, the scene is dominated by intense pink neon lighting from a street-level bar with japanese lanterns. The camera passes the DELAMAIN corporate sign and food stalls while palm trees become visible against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: main city street with corporate buildings and traffic

events.description: approaching large intersection with crosswalk markings becoming visible
waiting at intersection as futuristic vehicles pass by on the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk toward a major intersection, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the street with headlights on

entered.detail: yellow zebra stripes painted on the road surface
futuristic pedestrian bridge connecting buildings with glowing yellow trim
orange and white striped barriers blocking off construction area
massive dark glass tower dominating the skyline ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along a main city street toward a large intersection, passing construction barriers and other pedestrians. The DELAMAIN sign recedes into the background as a massive skyscraper looms ahead, with an overhead pedestrian walkway visible. The camera approaches the crosswalk as vehicles pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with holographic advertising displays

events.description: turns left at intersection to view large building covered in digital billboards
camera pans upward to view the towering architecture and overhead structures

agents.ego_description: pausing at the intersection to look around at the surrounding architecture and billboards

entered.detail: building facade covered in massive glowing advertisement screens showing various images
tall structure with reflective dark glass windows and corporate branding
futuristic traffic sign with illuminated display

segments.scene_description: At the major intersection, the camera turns left to reveal a building completely covered in massive digital billboards displaying advertisements. The scene showcases the dense futuristic architecture with overhead walkways and towering glass structures, while the camera pans to take in the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic shadows of a narrow alleyway into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by emerging from a dark, debris-strewn alley into a covered urban street beneath an elevated highway, where the environment shifts to a dim mix of artificial lighting and orange safety barriers. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens into a vibrant plaza dominated by intense pink neon from a street-level bar and Japanese lanterns, passing corporate signage and palm trees under the night sky. The perspective then transitions onto a main city street, moving past construction barriers and pedestrians toward a looming skyscraper and an overhead walkway. Finally, the camera reaches a major intersection and turns left to reveal a towering building completely enveloped in massive digital billboards, capturing the full scale of the dense cyberpunk cityscape.
